description: All-in-one workspace for notes, tasks, databases, and collaboration.
authentication: Email/password, OAuth2, SSO via Google, Azure AD, Okta
self_serve: Yes – users can sign up and create pages without assistance
api_surface: REST API for pages, databases, blocks, users, search, and integrations; Webhooks for changes
mcp: OAuth2 client credentials grant, rate limits (50 requests per second per integration)
buildability: Limited SDKs (JavaScript, Python, Go); no full CRUD for all object types; requires pagination and manual handling of block types
main_blocker: Restricted API access to certain page types, limited write permissions, and lack of full-featured SDKs
